title: Antilla quisqueyana
intro: Antilla quisqueyana, also known as the Quisqueya tree or Quisqueya Antilla, is a plant species native to the Dominican Republic, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The health benefits of Antilla quisqueyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to the prevention of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Antilla quisqueyana is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, as well as being used in the production of herbal extracts and supplements.
